sections.title: Once, after completing The Path of Glouphrie

lines.speaker: Longramble
lines.text: Hello there. How goes the hunt for Arposandra?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I've found an entrance to the city, but it's too well defended. There's all these traps, and some talking terrorbird guards!

lines.speaker: Longramble
lines.text: Talking terrorbirds? There must be some strange magic being practised in there. What do you plan to do?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't know. I think I've hit a dead end for now.

lines.speaker: Longramble
lines.text: That's a shame. Still, you've made a big discovery. It will be quite the tale to tell... assuming anyone believes a story about talking terrorbirds, that is.

sections.title: When delivering a tangled toad's legs

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello, Longramble. How goes the hunt for the edge of the world?

lines.speaker: Longramble
lines.text: Truth be told, I've found myself getting a bit side- tracked. The potential discovery of Arposandra is quite an exciting one!

lines.speaker: Longramble
lines.text: Yes, that's why I've not dared go inside again. It's much safer out here. Slightly less smelly as well.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Slightly being the key word there.

sections.title: Attempting to grapple the tree without a crossbow or grapple

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I appear to have misplaced the grappling equipment I need to cross the river.

lines.speaker: Longramble
lines.text: That wasn't very clever, was it?

lines.speaker: Longramble
lines.text: Well, it's a good job explorers like me know how to use their surroundings. I have an idea!
